Class DynamicCMenu

java.lang.Object
bibliothek.gui.dock.common.action.CAction
bibliothek.gui.dock.common.intern.action.CDecorateableAction<DynamicCMenu.Action>
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.docking.DynamicCMenu
public class DynamicCMenu extends bibliothek.gui.dock.common.intern.action.CDecorateableAction<DynamicCMenu.Action>
CMenu that gets (re-)generated when the action gets fired using the provided supplier. The generated CMenu behaves just like a normal CMenu (same positioning, content, etc.). The DynamicCMenu can be styled like other actions.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DynamicCMenu.Action
    Action that implements the dynamic behaviour and calls the supplier This class need not be instantiated manually, it is only public because it is contained in the generics of the surrounding class.
